title: Temporary Focus
description: Gain [gold]Focus[/gold] until the end of this turn.
smart_description: Gain [blue]Amount[/blue] [gold]Focus[/gold] until the end of this turn.
notes: Abstract temporary power that wraps the Focus power. Applies or adjusts internal Focus based on the amount and origin source (Card, Potion, or Relic). The Amount value in smart description represents the current stack count, dynamically determined when the power is applied. Removed at end of turn while refunding Focus stacks.
